title: Even Sum
description: Given a non-empty array of integers nums, return the sum of all even numbers in the array. For instance: Input=[1,2,3,4,8], Output=14
inputFormat: A non-empty array of integers nums
outputFormat: Sum of all even numbers as integer
sampleSolution:
def solve(array):
    return sum([i for i in array if i % 2 == 0])
